pi_items.source: setup_task.sh defines PCAP_FILE path and install_wireshark.sh downloads the file to this location.
export_result.sh checks this exact path to validate the output capture file.
verifier.py checks if 'evidence start' is in the first packet comment (case insensitive).
verifier.py checks if 'evidence end' is in the last packet comment (case insensitive).

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on a real PCAP file downloaded from the Wireshark Sample Captures wiki (200722_tcp_anon.pcapng). I have confirmed that the target stream with the most data is TCP stream index 1, which transfers 11,043 bytes over exactly 27 packets. The evaluation scripts strictly enforce the output file path '/home/ga/Documents/captures/evidence_annotated.pcapng' and check the first and last packet annotations for 'Evidence Start' and 'Evidence End' respectively.
